chunks.page_summary: This page displays a technical drawing with key specifications for the Rheonics SRV-SLP-A123-BH40 inline viscometer and density sensor, including its dimensions, connection type, and compliance.

key_facts: The document provides detailed dimensional specifications for the Rheonics SRV-SLP-A123-BH40.
The SRV-SLP-A123-BH40 features a sanitary fitting connection compliant with DIN 11851 and is DN40 in size.
The sensor has an insertion depth of 123 mm.
Rheonics specializes in inline process density and viscosity monitoring.
The product is protected by US and International patents.
The drawing is proprietary to Rheonics and requires approval for copying or informing third parties.
The release version of this document is 2310.
